author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Wrote DESIGN-CROSSLINK-OPS.md (683 lines) at repo root. Covers: goals + non-goals, 5 user stories, architecture diagram, SQLite schema (7 tables), REST + WebSocket API surface, frontend IA with SCADA tile grid, git-native agent-request protocol (extends hub branch layout), xterm.js PTY broker spec, alert catalogue, distribution via existing cargo install, 6 open questions with proposed resolutions, 5-phase rollout, 5 success criteria, appendix defending the architectural choices. Ready for review.
